gates.purpose: Validate repository head/branch/remote truth before planning or execution.
gates.required_inputs: git status, rev-parse HEAD, origin refs
gates.pass_condition: head and branch match expected launch baseline
gates.stop_condition: mismatch or detached truth without owner decision

gates.purpose: Ensure all source inputs exist and hash-validate.
gates.pass_condition: all required sources exist and hash records are present

gates.purpose: Confirm unresolved owner decisions are explicit before execution.
gates.pass_condition: no hidden decision gaps in blocking domains
stage write-scope aligns with ownership matrix

gates.purpose: Validate stage map structure and dependency correctness.
gates.pass_condition: dependencies are acyclic and within budget rules

gates.purpose: Enforce minimum evidence and receipt schema contracts.
gates.pass_condition: required schema contracts available for current stage group
gates.stop_condition: missing required schema for planned receipts

gates.purpose: Block PASS claims without evidence integrity.
gates.pass_condition: PASS has evidence paths and warnings integrity rules are satisfied
gates.stop_condition: PASS without evidence or hidden warning pattern

gates.purpose: Ensure dashboard only renders backend truth artifacts.
gates.pass_condition: every displayed state maps to real report or explicit disabled reason
gates.stop_condition: mock truth panel or missing report mapping

gates.purpose: Ensure task corridor launch has gate verdict and corridor receipts.
gates.pass_condition: allow_execution true only with complete evidence paths

gates.purpose: Guarantee deterministic stop/rollback behavior on blocker.
gates.pass_condition: blocker triggers stop and receipt generation
gates.stop_condition: blocker ignored or execution continues silently

gates.purpose: Prevent VM2-origin commit/sync violations in V1 lane.
gates.pass_condition: no VM2 commit path and no unauthorized sync action

gates.purpose: Ensure launch uses registered general/local task artifacts.
gates.pass_condition: required task registration artifacts exist and match plan

gates.purpose: Protect canonical artifacts from encoding regressions.
gates.pass_condition: UTF-8 parse and language policy checks pass

gates.purpose: Prevent repo pollution by runtime/private/generated payloads.
gates.required_inputs: repo purity contract and diff scope
gates.pass_condition: diff only includes scoped canonical artifacts
gates.stop_condition: local/runtime payload leaked into tracked scope

gates.purpose: Prevent stale artifacts from appearing green.
gates.pass_condition: fresh/stale state computed and stale not shown as green
gates.stop_condition: missing freshness metadata or stale-as-green display

gates.purpose: Final launch authorization gate before 20-stage execution.
gates.required_inputs: all previous gate reports and owner receipt
gates.pass_condition: owner launch receipt present and blocking gates PASS
gates.stop_condition: owner launch receipt missing or any blocking gate unresolved
